articles.title: ‘Buffy the Vampire Slayer’ actor Nicholas Brendon dies at 54
articles.description:
Brandon played Xander Harris, a close friend of lead character Buffy, on “Buffy the Vampire Slayer” that ran from 1997 to 2003.

The post ‘Buffy the Vampire Slayer’ actor Nicholas Brendon dies at 54 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Nicholas Brendon, known for his role in 'Buffy the Vampire Slayer', died at 54.
Brendon portrayed Xander Harris from 1997 to 2003, impacting Boston's pop culture.
His passing resonates with local fans and the Boston community's appreciation for the series.

articles.title: Review & Setlist: ‘We are foreign imports, so we have paid tariffs.’
articles.description:
The Hives played the House of Blues Friday, along with opening act The Chats.

The post Review & Setlist: ‘We are foreign imports, so we have paid tariffs.’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: The Hives performed at House of Blues on March 21, 2026.
Opening act The Chats energized the crowd with their punk rock style.
Local music fans enjoyed a vibrant night of live performances in Boston.
